response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile stacks; while there is a brief mention of C++ in a 2014 NI LabWindows role, it is outdated, isolated, and lacks financial domain context, failing to meet mandatory requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD exposure across multiple environments
concerns: No recent or relevant C++/Windows experience in finance
Absence of SQL Server/Oracle or fixed-income domain expertise
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) does not align with role requirements
